Account.title: Target Account
Account.description: A customer account targeted for the AI SWAT initiative.

name.description: The name of the customer account.

region.description: The geographic region of the account.

leads.description: The leads for this account (e.g., Alex and Olga for US).

status.description: The selection status of the account.

pocs.description: Point of contacts at the account.

otherAiTools.description: Other AI tools they are using and how.

UseCase.title: AI Use Case
UseCase.description: A high-impact AI use case identified for a Joule + WalkMe customer.

accountId.description: The ID of the associated account.

title.description: The title of the use case.

description.description: Detailed description of the use case.

valueProposition.description: The combined value proposition of Joule + WalkMe.

status.description: The development status of the use case.

businessProblem.description: The business problem or pain point being addressed.

aiCapability.description: The AI capability used (e.g., GenAI, Chatbot).

walkmeFeature.description: The WalkMe product or feature involved.

solutionAdvisor.description: The Solution Advisor assigned to this use case.

impactMetrics.description: The expected impact metrics or value.

jouleUsage.description: Details on how SAP Joule is being used.

walkmeUsage.description: Details on how WalkMe AI is being used.

tasks.description: List of action items, owners, and deadlines.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created this use case.

authorName.description: The name of the user who created this use case.

demoPresented.description: Whether a demo has been presented.

createdAt.description: When the use case was created.

User.title: User Profile
User.description: Profile information for Solution Advisors, Engineering, and Leadership.

role.description: The user's role in the initiative.

/useCases/{useCaseId}.description: Collection of identified AI use cases.
